```lean
theorem candidate_T1_routeA (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  -- Pick an element where Ōá is not 1.
  obtain ‚ü®h, hh‚ü© : ‚ąÉ h : G, Ōá h ‚Č† 1 := by
    by_contra hforall
    apply hŌá
    ext g
    by_contra hne
    exact hforall ‚ü®g, hne‚ü©

  let S : ‚Ąā := ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)

  have hmul : (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = S := by
    calc
      (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S
          = (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by rfl
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
            rw [Finset.mul_sum]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (h * g) : ‚Ąā) := by
            refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
            intro g hg
            norm_num [map_mul]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
            exact Fintype.sum_bijective (fun g : G => h * g) (by intro g; simp)
      _ = S := by rfl

  have hone_sub : (1 - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā)) * S = 0 := by
    have hs' : S - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = 0 := by
      linarith [hmul]
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, left_distrib, right_distrib,
      mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] using hs'

  have hŌáh_ne_one : (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) ‚Č† 1 := by
    exact hh

  have hcoeff_ne_zero : (1 - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā)) ‚Č† 0 := by
    intro hzero
    apply hŌáh_ne_one
    linarith

  have hS_zero : S = 0 := by
    exact mul_eq_zero.mp hone_sub |> Or.resolve_left hcoeff_ne_zero

  simpa [S] using hS_zero
```

```lean
theorem candidate_T1_routeA (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  obtain ‚ü®h, hh‚ü© : ‚ąÉ h : G, Ōá h ‚Č† 1 := by
    by_contra hnot
    apply hŌá
    ext g
    have hg : ¬¨ Ōá g ‚Č† 1 := by exact fun hg' => hnot ‚ü®g, hg'‚ü©
    exact not_not.mp hg

  let S : ‚Ąā := ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)

  have hmul : (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = S := by
    calc
      (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S
          = (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by rfl
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
            simp [mul_sum]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (h * g) : ‚Ąā) := by
            refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
            intro g _
            simpa using (map_mul Ōá h g)
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
            simpa using
              (Fintype.sum_bijective (fun g : G => h * g)
                (Function.bijective_iff_has_inverse.mpr
                  ‚ü®fun g => h‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * g, by intro g; simp [mul_assoc], by intro g; simp [mul_assoc]‚ü©))
      _ = S := by rfl

  have hsub : S - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = 0 := by
    rw [hmul, sub_self]

  have hone_sub : (1 - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā)) * S = 0 := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, left_distrib, right_distrib, mul_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]
      using hsub

  have hcoeff_ne_zero : (1 - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā)) ‚Č† 0 := by
    intro hzero
    apply hh
    linarith

  have hS_zero : S = 0 := by
    exact (mul_eq_zero.mp hone_sub).resolve_left hcoeff_ne_zero

  simpa [S] using hS_zero
```

```lean
theorem candidate_T1_routeA (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  obtain ‚ü®h, hh‚ü© : ‚ąÉ h : G, Ōá h ‚Č† 1 := by
    by_contra hnot
    apply hŌá
    ext g
    by_contra hg
    exact hnot ‚ü®g, hg‚ü©

  let S : ‚Ąā := ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)

  have hmul : (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = S := by
    calc
      (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by rfl
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
            simp [S, Finset.mul_sum]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (h * g) : ‚Ąā) := by
            refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
            intro g _
            simpa using (map_mul Ōá h g)
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
            simpa using
              (Fintype.sum_bijective (fun g : G => h * g)
                (Function.bijective_iff_has_inverse.mpr
                  ‚ü®fun g => h‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * g,
                    by intro g; simp [mul_assoc],
                    by intro g; simp [mul_assoc]‚ü©)
                (fun g => (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)))
      _ = S := by rfl

  have hone_sub : (1 - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā)) * S = 0 := by
    have : S - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = 0 := by simpa [hmul] using sub_self S
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, left_distrib, right_distrib, mul_assoc]
      using this

  have hcoeff_ne_zero : (1 - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā)) ‚Č† 0 := by
    intro hzero
    apply hh
    apply Complex.ofReal_injective
    have hzero' : ((1 - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā)) : ‚Ąā) = 0 := hzero
    linarith

  have hS_zero : S = 0 := by
    exact (mul_eq_zero.mp hone_sub).resolve_left hcoeff_ne_zero

  simpa [S] using hS_zero
```

```lean
theorem candidate_T1_routeA (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  obtain ‚ü®h, hh‚ü© : ‚ąÉ h : G, Ōá h ‚Č† 1 := by

    by_contra hg
    exact hnot ‚ü®g, hg‚ü©

  let S : ‚Ąā := ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)

  have hmul : (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = S := by
    calc
      (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by rfl
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
            simp [S, mul_sum]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (h * g) : ‚Ąā) := by

      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by

              (fun g => h‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * g)

              (by intro g; simp [mul_assoc])

  have hone_sub : (1 - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā)) * S = 0 := by
    have hs : S - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = 0 := by simpa [hmul] using sub_self S

  have hcoeff_ne_zero : (1 - (Ōá h : ‚Ąā)) ‚Č† 0 := by

  have hS_zero : S = 0 := (mul_eq_zero.mp hone_sub).resolve_left hcoeff_ne_zero
```
